commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fd12fcfe17766ce68b57dce28493cb73d875da1c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR teaches memory-wiki lint to treat unmanaged raw Markdown under `sources/` as raw source evidence while still flagging generated bridge/unsafe-local source pages that appear malformed or truncated.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +179. Total +234 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main compiles raw `sources/*.md` pages and then unconditionally emits `missing-id`, `missing-page-type`, and missing-`updatedAt` freshness lint when those pages lack frontmatter.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose the raw-sources versus structured-wrapper contract before automation can safely repair the remaining freshness behavior.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): stop flagging raw source pages as malformed
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat unmanaged raw Markdown under `sources/` as source evidence instead of emitting `missing-id` and `missing-page-type` structure errors.
- Keep malformed generated bridge/unsafe-local source pages visible to lint so #64696's truncated-cache class is not hidden.
- Add regression coverage for raw source pages and truncated managed source pages.

## Scope
This does not take on the markdown-aware wikilink/title resolver work from #70986 or the closed #73722 branch.

## Test plan
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/memory-wiki/src/lint.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/markdown.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Credits: reported by @arlen8411 in #69700; #64696 context is used as a guardrail.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-11828-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Credit #69700 to @arlen8411 for identifying the raw-source lint/frontmatter contract mismatch.; Carry #64696 forward as a regression guard: malformed generated bridge source pages must still be detected instead of being silently treated as healthy raw source files.; Do not borrow code from #73722 unless the executor intentionally uses its link-normalization approach; #73722 is related but not the source PR for this raw-source fix.
- Validation: pnpm exec vitest run extensions/memory-wiki/src/lint.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/markdown.test.ts; pnpm check:changed

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against fd12fcfe1776.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish
